title: subworkflow - aws change instance state
description:
Subworkflow to change or assert EC2 instance state

Parameters:

instanceId: (Required) Instance ID
desiredState: (Required) Desired state - running, stopped, terminated
assertState: (Optional) Assert the state rather than change it
awsregion: (Required) AWS region
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) AWS OIDC connection

Changes or verifies instance state
guide:
## 🔀 **Change Instance State**

Changes EC2 instance state via SSM.
